title: OG Puzzlers: Synthwave Cars
description:
OG Puzzlers: Synthwave Cars is an hardcore puzzel game with cars in an stunning synthwave style. You have to assemble a single image from random generated indivdual pieces. 
Combine all of the smart singel frames into one big image and unlock the next level.features:• 12 Levels

• 25 to 69 frames

• very difficult puzzle adventure

• auto saving

• simple mouse control

• 100 steam awards
description_short: OG Puzzlers: Synthwave Cars is an hardcore puzzel game with cars in an stunning synthwave style. You have to assemble a single image from random generated indivdual pieces. Combine all of the smart singel frames into one big image and unlock the next level.
